name: Logistics & Supply Chain
description: Models for warehousing, order fulfillment, cross-docking, freight, distribution networks, and supply chain operations.

name: Retail
description: Consumer-facing retail operations including storefront queuing, checkout, fulfillment, and point-of-sale operations.

name: Warehousing
description: Warehouse operations including receiving, putaway, storage, picking, packing, and shipping. Sub-domain of Logistics & Supply Chain covering the specific operational scope inside the warehouse itself. Proposed by Seeder during the warehouse order picking walkthrough — see proposal.csv row 1.

name: E-Commerce
description: Cross-cutting domain for online retail fulfillment operations including order management, warehouse picking, packing, and last-mile delivery for direct-to-consumer channels. Proposed by Seeder during the warehouse order picking walkthrough — see proposal.csv row 2.

name: Service Operations
description: Cross-cutting domain for service-oriented queueing and resource-contention models that serve customers through finite-capacity resources, independent of a specific industry. Non-canonical cross-cutting theme already approved in prior walkthroughs.
